understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the current BP35 level (and then subsequent levels) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', while avoiding spikes that immediately end the attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, and after the horizontal move the character would automatically travel in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid safe tile, hitting a hazard (spikes), or reaching the goal. CLICK could be used on specific coordinates to interact with clickable tiles (notably to remove breakable 'x' blocks to open/alter fall paths) without consuming movement-based timers when present. UNDO would revert the previous action. Attempts were limited (2 per level) with a 50-turn budget, so moves needed to be planned using the landing previews and corridor scan to find safe passages to new vertical sections and avoid landing on spikes.
